The '''Battle of Tralus''' was a battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The battle==
[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Danetta Pitta]] had been accepted by the [[Diktat]] as the "protector" of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], leaving him in command of important strategic assets. Rival [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Josef Grunger]] attacked his former comrade's holdings under the command of the false [[Trioculus]]. The remnants of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Imperial Civil War|fought each other]]; Grunger's forces were overwhelmed by Pitta's [[Grand Admiral Pitta's torpedo sphere|Torpedo Sphere]] but the battle was decided when Grunger's flagship, [[Aggressor (Executor-class)|''Aggressor'']], rammed the sphere, killing both officers.

{{Battle-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' mistakenly notes that the battle occurred above [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="TEGtW" />
